steps.title: Simplify the coefficient
steps.content:
In the first parenthesis, combine like terms:
$$x + 0.25x = (1 + 0.25)x = 1.25x$$
So the function becomes:
$$f(x) = 1.25x(50 - x)$$

steps.title: Substitute x = 20 and calculate
steps.content:
$$f(20) = 1.25(20)(50 - 20)$$
Evaluate each part:
  • $1.25 \times 20 = 25$
  • $50 - 20 = 30$
Then multiply:
$$f(20) = 25 \times 30 = 750$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
